title: Viners Barware Gold 1 Litre Stainless Steel Single Wall Ice Bucket
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our single-wall ice bucket is an indispensable addition to any home bar. This stylish product keeps ice cold and contained, ready to refresh drinks as you entertain guests.

KEEP THINGS FRESH | This Viners Ice Bucket has a 1 litre capacity, making it the perfect size for chilling small bottles of wine as well as storing fresh-cut fruit. The single-wall bucket is also complete with two carry handles.

BRUSHED GOLD | Made from fine quality stainless steel, our single-wall ice bucket is complete with a brushed gold finish that won’t scuff or tarnish easily. This product is hand wash only without using abrasive sponges.

BARWARE RANGE | Part of the Viners Barware Collection, you can entertain, create, and serve with quality and flair with the range boasting a wide range of tools to professionally entertain guests at home.
VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and a household name that is steeped in heritage.

Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting. Ideal for Whiskey, Bourbon and Scotch. Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit.
